face.features: The woman has expressive brown eyes with visible crow's feet when smiling. Her nose is straight and of medium size. She has full lips and a wide, genuine smile that reveals white teeth and prominent smile lines around her mouth.

distinctive_features: Small mole on the left cheek (viewer's right side of the face)
Léger creux au menton visible en souriant
Ridules aux coins externes des yeux (pattes d'oie)
Fines lignes sur le front et autour des yeux
Visible crow's feet around the eyes when smiling
Petites taches de rousseur sur les joues et le nez
Small mole on the right arm (viewer's left arm)
